title: taraxacum macrotomum
intro: Taraxacum macrotomum, also known as the large-seeded dandelion or big-seeded hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting liver health. Taraxacum macrotomum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
